reach_why: Applies across AI, cognition, education, and identity by reframing continual learning as preservation of protected assumptions.
novelty_why: Recasts regularization as constitutional protection of arbitrary invariants, illuminating learning as constraint-preserving adaptation.
falsifiable_why: Partly testable in learning systems, but universal claims about all learners rely on metaphorical, underdefined foundations.
explanation: Learning may depend on preserving opaque core commitments that shape and limit all later adaptation.
